stimulus: Maintaining the International Prototype of the Kilogram standards is no simple job. Each year, calibration data from national mass-measurement laboratories around the world are gathered and transmitted to the Bureau International des Poids et Mesures (BIPM) in Sèvres, France. ______blank BIPM physicists carry out the painstaking work of reconciling these slightly varying figures into a single, internationally agreed-upon mass standard.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. "There" indicates that the work of reconciling the figures into a single mass standard takes place at the Bureau International des Poids et Mesures in Sèvres, France. Because "there" indicates a location, it fits the context perfectly.

Choice A is incorrect. "For instance" introduces an example, but this sentence is describing where the reconciliation takes place, not giving an example of the work described in the previous sentence. Choice B is incorrect. "By contrast" introduces a disagreement, but this sentence does not disagree with the previous one—they both describe the work involved in maintaining the mass standard. Choice C is incorrect. "Specifically" narrows or restates a previous claim, but this sentence does not narrow the previous information; it identifies the place where the next stage of work happens.
